articles.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 makers face backlash for casting Akashdeep Saigal, 51, as Tulsi’s grandson; Netizens says 'Ekta Kapoor, what have you done?'
articles.description: The resurgence of Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi with its second season is heightened by the exciting return of Akashdeep Saigal, who steps back into the shoes of Rio, Tulsi's grandson. At 51, Saigal quashes concerns regarding his age by exuding youthful vigor and passion for the role.

articles.title: Aneet Padda's 'Shakti Shalini' schoolgirl look LEAKED - WATCH
articles.description: A leaked clip from 'Shakti Shalini' shows Aneet Padda in a surprising schoolgirl avatar, a stark contrast to her previously teased powerful character. Filming in Gwalior, the horror-comedy, part of Maddock's universe, features Padda in a de-glam look. The film's release date is being adjusted to avoid a clash with Shah Rukh Khan's 'King'.

articles.title: Ranveer's Dhurandhar 2 crosses Rs 1780 cr globally on Day 41
articles.description: As theaters continue to buzz with excitement, Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' celebrates a triumphant 40-day run, inching ever closer to matching the legendary 'Baahubali 2's box office achievements. This pulse-pounding espionage thriller has raked in an incredible Rs 1780 crore worldwide, bolstered by robust domestic earnings of Rs 1132.99 crore net. Read the full article to know more in detail.

These posts, while not directly addressing the engagement, have led fans to speculate about their connection to Tatum's past relationship with Kravitz.

articles.description: The horoscope tomorrow forecast for 30th April 2026 highlights a decisive shift in collective energy, where ambition rises but communication requires careful handling due to Mercury combustion. This tomorrow’s horoscope reading signals a day where emotional intelligence, strategic patience, and disciplined execution define outcomes across career, love, and health. The horoscope for tomorrow strongly indicates that while opportunities expand, clarity in thought and speech will determine success. In this daily horoscope tomorrow, each zodiac sign experiences a unique blend of progress and caution, making it essential to move with awareness rather than impulse. Overall, the horoscope tomorrow energy supports growth, but only through structured thinking and emotional balance.

articles.title: Baldoni’s lawyers say 'unlikable' Blake caused business losses
articles.description: Justin Baldoni's legal team countered Blake Lively's claims of financial and reputational damage, attributing her brand's struggles to its own shortcomings, not a smear campaign. They questioned her multi-million dollar loss projections, citing her past earnings and past public missteps. Lively's team insists she suffered significant harm and awaits her chance to testify.

articles.title: The secret molecule behind your sunburn: Why DNA isn’t the real culprit
articles.description: Scientists have discovered that RNA, not DNA, is the primary cause of the burning sensation from sunburn. UV exposure damages RNA, triggering a cellular alarm system that leads to inflammation. This groundbreaking finding shifts our understanding of skin protection, emphasizing the need to shield RNA from sun damage to prevent redness and discomfort.

articles.title: In 1868, a local hunter wandered through the hills and accidentally discovered a prehistoric cave hidden for thousands of years
articles.description: A hunter's chance discovery in 1868 led to the unearthing of the Altamira Cave, revealing prehistoric art. Initially doubted, these 14,000-year-old cave paintings, showcasing remarkable skill, are now recognized as masterpieces. Preserved by a natural rockfall, the cave offers a glimpse into humanity's ancient artistic expression, reminding us that history often lies hidden in plain sight.

articles.title: Stephen Miller Used Wife as Shield During WHCD Scare? Katie Miller Breaks Silence
articles.description: Fresh videos from the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting scare have gone viral, showing Stephen Miller and his wife Katie Miller rushing out as chaos unfolded at the venue. In the footage, Miller is seen walking behind his wife while security escorts them, with his hand placed on her upper body during the tense evacuation. The clip quickly sparked intense online reactions, with social media users focusing on the moment and raising allegations that fueled a widespread backlash.

articles.title: Sipping hot tea can increase cancer risk? Doctor shares a surprising link and suggests a simple fix
articles.description: Drinking tea very hot, especially above 65°C, has been linked to an increased risk of oesophageal cancer. Studies show that consuming beverages at this temperature can damage the oesophagus lining, leading to chronic inflammation and cellular mutations. Allowing tea to cool for a few minutes before drinking significantly reduces this risk.

Pritam discusses his personal ways of coping with loss, highlighting how the film's soundtrack evokes cherished friendships and irreplaceable voices.

articles.title: George Clooney supports Jimmy Kimmel as Donald Trump demands he be fired: ‘Jokes are jokes’
articles.description: Hollywood star George Clooney has defended Jimmy Kimmel amidst a firestorm over a joke about Melania Trump. Clooney contrasted Kimmel's comedy with potentially dangerous political rhetoric, highlighting concerns about heated discourse. The controversy erupted after a clip of Kimmel's joke resurfaced following an incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, drawing sharp criticism from President Trump and Melania Trump herself.
